final:
module RefModule (
    input wire CLK,
    input wire WE,
    input wire [8-1:1-1] DI,
    output reg [7:0] DO
);
    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (WE) begin
            DO <= DI;  // Write data to memory cell
        end
        // else DO retains its previous state (read operation)
    end
endmodule
